blocks.content: After class. The hallway filled fast. I came out the door and she was already gone — just the back of her turning the corner.

blocks.speaker: Jonathan
blocks.content: Aye — did you talk to her?

blocks.speaker: Jonathan
blocks.content: Bruh that's not how timing works. You gotta move before the door closes.

blocks.speaker: Jonathan
blocks.content: BRUH. Before tryouts. Morning. You see her, you say something. Anything. 'What you said in class was real.' Done. That's it. You don't need a speech.
It sounded easy when he said it. It always does.

blocks.prompt: Jonathan makes it sound simple. Is it?

options.label: "Aight. If I see her, I'll say something."
"I'm not doing that in the middle of the hallway."
